title: phanera excelsa var. excelsa
intro: Phanera excelsa var. excelsa, also known as the Giant Strangler Fig, is a variety of the Strangler Fig plant, a type of epiphytic vine native to Southeast Asia, characterized by its unique ability to strangle and kill the host tree as it grows. The medicinal properties of Phanera excelsa var. excelsa include its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial properties, which have been used to treat various health issues. The health benefits of this plant include its potential to lower blood pressure, improve digestion, and reduce the risk of certain diseases due to its antioxidant and anti-inflammatory properties. The herbal preparations of Phanera excelsa var. excelsa include teas, infusions, and extracts, which are typically made by drying the leaves and roots of the plant and steeping them in hot water.
